title: Morning Exercise — Tai Chi
location: St Luke's ElderCare AAC (Ang Mo Kio)
description: This guided Tai Chi class helps seniors improve balance, posture, and joint mobility through slow, controlled movement. Instructors provide progressive options so participants of different fitness levels can take part safely.

title: WE! Workout Empowerment
location: St Luke's ElderCare AAC (Ang Mo Kio)
description: SLEC's signature functional workout combines resistance drills, balance training, and guided stretching to maintain independence. Coaches monitor intensity and form to support safe, consistent progress.

title: Chair Zumba
location: St Luke's ElderCare AAC (Ang Mo Kio)
description: A seated dance fitness session set to upbeat Latin and evergreen tracks keeps seniors active while reducing joint strain. The choreography is simple, rhythmic, and designed for all mobility levels.

title: Arts & Craft Workshop
location: St Luke's ElderCare AAC (Ang Mo Kio)
description: Participants explore painting, paper craft, and tactile art projects that support fine motor skills and self-expression. Each week features a themed activity with guided instruction and peer sharing.

title: Karaoke Social Session
location: St Luke's ElderCare AAC (Ang Mo Kio)
description: This social sing-along features familiar songs in Mandarin, Hokkien, Malay, and English to spark joy and connection. Seniors rotate solos and group performances in a supportive community setting.

title: Silver Memories — Reminiscence Therapy
location: St Luke's ElderCare AAC (Ang Mo Kio)
description: Facilitators use old photographs, music, and everyday artifacts to encourage memory recall and storytelling. The session strengthens cognitive engagement while nurturing confidence and identity.

title: MINT — Mindful Immersive Nature Therapy
location: St Luke's ElderCare AAC (Ang Mo Kio)
description: This structured nature-based programme guides seniors through sensory grounding, gentle movement, and reflective breathing. Activities are designed to reduce stress and improve emotional wellbeing.

title: Groove & Move — Dance Fitness
location: St Luke's ElderCare AAC (Ang Mo Kio)
description: Seniors follow easy choreography to nostalgic and contemporary tunes to improve stamina, coordination, and confidence. Instructors adapt steps to keep the class inclusive and enjoyable.

title: Groove & Move — Dance Fitness

title: The GoodLife Workout
description: Montfort Care's signature functional class combines cardio, strength, and balance drills to support mobility and confidence. Trainers tailor movement intensity to match each participant's ability.

title: Nagomi Art Therapy
description: Seniors explore Japanese pastel finger-blending techniques to create calming artwork and regulate emotions. The session promotes mindfulness, hand coordination, and creative confidence.

title: Kopi Sessions — Social Chat
description: This informal coffee gathering gives seniors a space to discuss current topics, personal stories, and neighbourhood happenings. Facilitators guide inclusive conversation to strengthen social support.

title: GoodLife Makan — Community Cooking
description: Participants cook nutritious recipes in small teams, learning portion planning and healthier ingredient swaps. The session concludes with a shared meal that builds community and confidence in home cooking.

title: Reminiscence Therapy — Memory Lane
description: Using familiar songs, household objects, and old photos, facilitators prompt meaningful memory sharing. This structured therapy supports cognitive stimulation and emotional connection among peers.

title: Karaoke & Sing-Along
description: Seniors enjoy classic multilingual favourites in an upbeat sing-along that encourages participation and laughter. Group performances strengthen confidence while reducing social isolation.

title: Chair Yoga & Stretching
description: Gentle chair-supported yoga improves flexibility, breathing control, and body awareness without floor work. Instructors emphasize safe alignment and paced movement for older adults.

title: Digital Media Skills Workshop
description: Hands-on coaching covers smartphone photography, video calling, social messaging, and scam awareness. Seniors practise live with facilitators so they can confidently use digital tools at home.

location: St Luke's ElderCare AAC (Ang Mo Kio)

description: Energetic group drumming fitness session combining rhythm, movement and music on exercise balls to boost cardiovascular fitness, upper body strength and coordination.
